query: What does the card update map COCRDUP contain?

        TITLE 'BMS MAP FOR UPDATE CARDS  '

results.name: CCRDUPA
results.content:
CCRDUPA DFHMDI CTRL=(FREEKB),                                          -
               DSATTS=(COLOR,HILIGHT,PS,VALIDN),                       -
               MAPATTS=(COLOR,HILIGHT,PS,VALIDN),                      -
               SIZE=(24,80)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(1,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Tran:'
TRNNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,FSET,NORM),                                -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=4,                                               -
               POS=(1,7)
TITLE01 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(1,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(1,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Date:'
CURDATE DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(1,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='mm/dd/yy'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,1),                                              -
               INITIAL='Prog:'
PGMNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,7)
TITLE02 DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(2,21)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=5,                                               -
               POS=(2,65),                                             -
               INITIAL='Time:'
CURTIME DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=BLUE,                                             -
               LENGTH=8,                                               -
               POS=(2,71),                                             -
               INITIAL='hh:mm:ss'
        DFHMDF COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               LENGTH=26,                                              -
               POS=(4,30),                                             -
               INITIAL='Update Credit Card Details'
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=19,                                              -
               POS=(7,23),                                             -
               INITIAL='Account Number    :'
ACCTSID DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,IC,NORM,PROT),                              -
               COLOR=DEFAULT,                                          -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=11,                                              -
               POS=(7,45)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(7,57)
        DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=19,                                              -
               POS=(8,23),                                             -
               INITIAL='Card Number       :'
CARDSID DFHMDF ATTRB=(FSET,NORM,UNPROT),                               -
               COLOR=DEFAULT,                                          -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=16,                                              -
               POS=(8,45)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(8,62)
        DFHMDF COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=20,                                              -
               POS=(11,4),                                             -
               INITIAL='Name on card      :'
CRDNAME DFHMDF ATTRB=(UNPROT),                                         -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=50,                                              -
               POS=(11,25)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(11,76)
        DFHMDF COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=20,                                              -
               POS=(13,4),                                             -
               INITIAL='Card Active Y/N   : '
CRDSTCD DFHMDF ATTRB=(UNPROT),                                         -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               LENGTH=1,                                               -
               POS=(13,25)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(13,27)
        DFHMDF COLOR=TURQUOISE,                                        -
               LENGTH=20,                                              -
               POS=(15,4),                                             -
               INITIAL='Expiry Date       : '
EXPMON  DFHMDF ATTRB=(UNPROT),                                         -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               JUSTIFY=(RIGHT),                                        -
               LENGTH=2,                                               -
               POS=(15,25)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=1,                                               -
               POS=(15,28),                                            -
               INITIAL='/'
EXPYEAR DFHMDF ATTRB=(UNPROT),                                         -
               HILIGHT=UNDERLINE,                                      -
               JUSTIFY=(RIGHT),                                        -
               LENGTH=4,                                               -
               POS=(15,30)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(15,35)
EXPDAY  DFHMDF ATTRB=(DRK,FSET,PROT),                                  -
               HILIGHT=OFF,                                            -
               JUSTIFY=(RIGHT),                                        -
               LENGTH=2,                                               -
               POS=(15,36)
        DFHMDF LENGTH=0,                                               -
               POS=(15,39)
INFOMSG DFHMDF ATTRB=(PROT),                                           -
               COLOR=NEUTRAL,                                          -
               HILIGHT=OFF,                                            -
               LENGTH=40,                                              -
               POS=(20,25)
ERRMSG  DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,BRT,FSET),                                 -
               COLOR=RED,                                              -
               LENGTH=80,                                              -
               POS=(23,1)
FKEYS   DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,NORM),                                     -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=21,                                              -
               POS=(24,1),                                             -
               INITIAL='ENTER=Process F3=Exit'
FKEYSC  DFHMDF ATTRB=(ASKIP,DRK),                                      -
               COLOR=YELLOW,                                           -
               LENGTH=18,                                              -
               POS=(24,23),                                            -
               INITIAL='F5=Save F12=Cancel'
        DFHMSD TYPE=FINAL
        END
*
* Ver: CardDemo_v1.0-70-g193b394-123 Date: 2022-08-22 17:02:43 CDT
*

results.name: COCRDUP
results.content:
COCRDUP DFHMSD LANG=COBOL,                                             -
               MODE=INOUT,                                             -
               STORAGE=AUTO,                                           -
               TIOAPFX=YES,                                            -
               TYPE=&&SYSPARM

results.name: 1200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS, 1200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COCRDUPC.cbl
Program: COCRDUPC - Business logic - Accept and process credit card detail request
Paragraph: 1200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS, 1200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS-EXIT (lines 641-720)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDUP, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
Calls: PERFORM 1210-EDIT-ACCOUNT, PERFORM 1220-EDIT-CARD, PERFORM 1230-EDIT-NAME, PERFORM 1240-EDIT-CARDSTATUS, PERFORM 1250-EDIT-EXPIRY-MON, PERFORM 1260-EDIT-EXPIRY-YEAR
results.summary: paragraph 1200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS, 1200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS-EXIT in COCRDUPC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID.... invokes: PERFORM 1210-EDIT-ACCOUNT, PERFORM 1220-EDIT-CARD, PERFORM 1230-EDIT-NAME, PERFORM 1240-EDIT-CARDSTATUS....
results.content:
1200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS.                                                    
                                                                                
           SET INPUT-OK                  TO TRUE                                
                                                                                
           IF  CCUP-DETAILS-NOT-FETCHED                                         
      *        VALIDATE THE SEARCH KEYS                                         
               PERFORM 1210-EDIT-ACCOUNT                                        
                  THRU 1210-EDIT-ACCOUNT-EXIT                                   
                                                                                
               PERFORM 1220-EDIT-CARD                                           
                  THRU 1220-EDIT-CARD-EXIT                                      
                                                                                
               MOVE LOW-VALUES                 TO CCUP-NEW-CARDDATA             
                                                                                
      *       IF THE SEARCH CONDITIONS HAVE PROBLEMS SKIP OTHER EDITS           
               IF  FLG-ACCTFILTER-BLANK                                         
               AND FLG-CARDFILTER-BLANK                                         
                   SET NO-SEARCH-CRITERIA-RECEIVED TO TRUE                      
               END-IF                                                           
                                                                                
               GO TO 1200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS-EXIT                                  
                                                                                
           ELSE                                                                 
               CONTINUE                                                         
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
      *    SEARCH KEYS ALREADY VALIDATED AND DATA FETCHED                       
           SET FOUND-CARDS-FOR-ACCOUNT TO TRUE                                  
           SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-ISVALID  TO TRUE                                  
           SET FLG-CARDFILTER-ISVALID  TO TRUE                                  
           MOVE CCUP-OLD-ACCTID     TO CDEMO-ACCT-ID                            
           MOVE CCUP-OLD-CARDID     TO CDEMO-CARD-NUM                           
           MOVE CCUP-OLD-CRDNAME    TO CARD-EMBOSSED-NAME                       
           MOVE CCUP-OLD-CRDSTCD    TO CARD-ACTIVE-STATUS                       
           MOVE CCUP-OLD-EXPDAY     TO CARD-EXPIRY-DAY                          
           MOVE CCUP-OLD-EXPMON     TO CARD-EXPIRY-MONTH                        
           MOVE CCUP-OLD-EXPYEAR    TO CARD-EXPIRY-YEAR                         
                                                                                
      *    NEW DATA IS SAME AS OLD DATA                                         
           IF  (FUNCTION UPPER-CASE(CCUP-NEW-CARDDATA) EQUAL                    
                FUNCTION UPPER-CASE(CCUP-OLD-CARDDATA))                         
               SET NO-CHANGES-DETECTED TO TRUE                                  
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           IF  NO-CHANGES-DETECTED                                              
           OR  CCUP-CHANGES-OK-NOT-CONFIRMED                                    
           OR  CCUP-CHANGES-OKAYED-AND-DONE                                     
               SET FLG-CARDNAME-ISVALID    TO TRUE                              
               SET FLG-CARDSTATUS-ISVALID  TO TRUE                              
               SET FLG-CARDEXPMON-ISVALID  TO TRUE                              
               SET FLG-CARDEXPYEAR-ISVALID TO TRUE                              
               GO TO 1200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS-EXIT                                  
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
           SET CCUP-CHANGES-NOT-OK    TO TRUE                                   
                                                                                
           PERFORM 1230-EDIT-NAME                                               
              THRU 1230-EDIT-NAME-EXIT                                          
                                                                                
           PERFORM 1240-EDIT-CARDSTATUS                                         
              THRU 1240-EDIT-CARDSTATUS-EXIT                                    
                                                                                
           PERFORM 1250-EDIT-EXPIRY-MON                                         
              THRU 1250-EDIT-EXPIRY-MON-EXIT                                    
                                                                                
           PERFORM 1260-EDIT-EXPIRY-YEAR                                        
              THRU 1260-EDIT-EXPIRY-YEAR-EXIT                                   
                                                                                
           IF INPUT-ERROR                                                       
              CONTINUE                                                          
           ELSE                                                                 
              SET CCUP-CHANGES-OK-NOT-CONFIRMED TO TRUE                         
           END-IF                                                               
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
       1200-EDIT-MAP-INPUTS-EXIT.                                               
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: 3000-SEND-MAP, 3000-SEND-MAP-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COCRDUPC.cbl
Program: COCRDUPC - Business logic - Accept and process credit card detail request
Paragraph: 3000-SEND-MAP, 3000-SEND-MAP-EXIT (lines 1035-1051)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDUP, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
Calls: PERFORM 3100-SCREEN-INIT, PERFORM 3200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS, PERFORM 3250-SETUP-INFOMSG, PERFORM 3300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS, PERFORM 3400-SEND-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph 3000-SEND-MAP, 3000-SEND-MAP-EXIT in COCRDUPC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID.... invokes: PERFORM 3100-SCREEN-INIT, PERFORM 3200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS, PERFORM 3250-SETUP-INFOMSG, PERFORM 3300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS....
results.content:
3000-SEND-MAP.                                                           
           PERFORM 3100-SCREEN-INIT                                             
              THRU 3100-SCREEN-INIT-EXIT                                        
           PERFORM 3200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS                                       
              THRU 3200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS-EXIT                                  
           PERFORM 3250-SETUP-INFOMSG                                           
              THRU 3250-SETUP-INFOMSG-EXIT                                      
           PERFORM 3300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS                                      
              THRU 3300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS-EXIT                                 
           PERFORM 3400-SEND-SCREEN                                             
              THRU 3400-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT                                        
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
       3000-SEND-MAP-EXIT.                                                      
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: 3400-SEND-SCREEN
results.preamble:
File: COCRDUPC.cbl
Program: COCRDUPC - Business logic - Accept and process credit card detail request
Paragraph: 3400-SEND-SCREEN (lines 1324-1337)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDUP, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 3400-SEND-SCREEN in COCRDUPC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
3400-SEND-SCREEN.                                                        
                                                                                
           MOVE LIT-THISMAPSET         TO CCARD-NEXT-MAPSET                     
           MOVE LIT-THISMAP            TO CCARD-NEXT-MAP                        
                                                                                
           EXEC CICS SEND MAP(CCARD-NEXT-MAP)                                   
                          MAPSET(CCARD-NEXT-MAPSET)                             
                          FROM(CCRDUPAO)                                        
                          CURSOR                                                
                          ERASE                                                 
                          FREEKB                                                
                          RESP(WS-RESP-CD)                                      
           END-EXEC                                                             
           .

results.name: 1100-RECEIVE-MAP, 1100-RECEIVE-MAP-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COCRDUPC.cbl
Program: COCRDUPC - Business logic - Accept and process credit card detail request
Paragraph: 1100-RECEIVE-MAP, 1100-RECEIVE-MAP-EXIT (lines 578-640)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDUP, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 1100-RECEIVE-MAP, 1100-RECEIVE-MAP-EXIT in COCRDUPC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
1100-RECEIVE-MAP.                                                        
           EXEC CICS RECEIVE MAP(LIT-THISMAP)                                   
                     MAPSET(LIT-THISMAPSET)                                     
                     INTO(CCRDUPAI)                                             
                     RESP(WS-RESP-CD)                                           
                     RESP2(WS-REAS-CD)                                          
           END-EXEC                                                             
                                                                                
           INITIALIZE CCUP-NEW-DETAILS                                          
                                                                                
      *    REPLACE * WITH LOW-VALUES                                            
           IF  ACCTSIDI OF CCRDUPAI = '*'                                       
           OR  ACCTSIDI OF CCRDUPAI = SPACES                                    
               MOVE LOW-VALUES           TO  CC-ACCT-ID                         
                                             CCUP-NEW-ACCTID                    
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE ACCTSIDI OF CCRDUPAI TO  CC-ACCT-ID                         
                                             CCUP-NEW-ACCTID                    
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           IF  CARDSIDI OF CCRDUPAI = '*'                                       
           OR  CARDSIDI OF CCRDUPAI = SPACES                                    
               MOVE LOW-VALUES           TO  CC-CARD-NUM                        
                                             CCUP-NEW-CARDID                    
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE CARDSIDI OF CCRDUPAI TO  CC-CARD-NUM                        
                                             CCUP-NEW-CARDID                    
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           IF  CRDNAMEI OF CCRDUPAI = '*'                                       
           OR  CRDNAMEI OF CCRDUPAI = SPACES                                    
               MOVE LOW-VALUES           TO  CCUP-NEW-CRDNAME                   
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE CRDNAMEI OF CCRDUPAI TO  CCUP-NEW-CRDNAME                   
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           IF  CRDSTCDI OF CCRDUPAI = '*'                                       
           OR  CRDSTCDI OF CCRDUPAI = SPACES                                    
               MOVE LOW-VALUES           TO  CCUP-NEW-CRDSTCD                   
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE CRDSTCDI OF CCRDUPAI TO  CCUP-NEW-CRDSTCD                   
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           MOVE EXPDAYI     OF CCRDUPAI  TO  CCUP-NEW-EXPDAY                    
                                                                                
           IF  EXPMONI OF CCRDUPAI = '*'                                        
           OR  EXPMONI OF CCRDUPAI = SPACES                                     
               MOVE LOW-VALUES           TO  CCUP-NEW-EXPMON                    
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE EXPMONI OF CCRDUPAI  TO  CCUP-NEW-EXPMON                    
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           IF  EXPYEARI OF CCRDUPAI = '*'                                       
           OR  EXPYEARI OF CCRDUPAI = SPACES                                    
               MOVE LOW-VALUES           TO  CCUP-NEW-EXPYEAR                   
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE EXPYEARI OF CCRDUPAI TO  CCUP-NEW-EXPYEAR                   
           END-IF                                                               
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
       1100-RECEIVE-MAP-EXIT.                                                   
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: 9300-CHECK-CHANGE-IN-REC
results.preamble:
File: COCRDUPC.cbl
Program: COCRDUPC - Business logic - Accept and process credit card detail request
Paragraph: 9300-CHECK-CHANGE-IN-REC (lines 1498-1520)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDUP, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 9300-CHECK-CHANGE-IN-REC in COCRDUPC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
9300-CHECK-CHANGE-IN-REC.                                                
           INSPECT CARD-EMBOSSED-NAME                                           
           CONVERTING LIT-LOWER                                                 
                   TO LIT-UPPER                                                 
                                                                                
           IF  CARD-CVV-CD              EQUAL  TO CCUP-OLD-CVV-CD               
           AND CARD-EMBOSSED-NAME       EQUAL  TO CCUP-OLD-CRDNAME              
           AND CARD-EXPIRAION-DATE(1:4) EQUAL  TO CCUP-OLD-EXPYEAR              
           AND CARD-EXPIRAION-DATE(6:2) EQUAL  TO CCUP-OLD-EXPMON               
           AND CARD-EXPIRAION-DATE(9:2) EQUAL  TO CCUP-OLD-EXPDAY               
           AND CARD-ACTIVE-STATUS       EQUAL  TO CCUP-OLD-CRDSTCD              
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
              SET DATA-WAS-CHANGED-BEFORE-UPDATE TO TRUE                        
              MOVE CARD-CVV-CD                 TO CCUP-OLD-CVV-CD               
              MOVE CARD-EMBOSSED-NAME          TO CCUP-OLD-CRDNAME              
              MOVE CARD-EXPIRAION-DATE(1:4)    TO CCUP-OLD-EXPYEAR              
              MOVE CARD-EXPIRAION-DATE(6:2)    TO CCUP-OLD-EXPMON               
              MOVE CARD-EXPIRAION-DATE(9:2)    TO CCUP-OLD-EXPDAY               
              MOVE CARD-ACTIVE-STATUS          TO CCUP-OLD-CRDSTCD              
              GO TO 9200-WRITE-PROCESSING-EXIT                                  
           END-IF EXIT                                                          
           .
